title: Why Opal is the Best Value Minecraft Client in 2026
description: At $8.99, Opal offers more features, better platform support, and a hybrid ghost/blatant approach that competitors can't match.
excerpt: We built Opal to be the most accessible premium client on the market. Here's what $8.99 gets you.
author: Opal Team

title: Introducing Opal's GraalVM Scripting Engine
description: Write custom JavaScript scripts that interact with Opal's internal APIs. Automate, customize, and extend your client.
excerpt: Opal's scripting engine runs on GraalVM — a full JavaScript runtime inside Minecraft. Here's what you can do with it.
author: Opal Team

title: How to Use Opal's Config Sharing System
description: Browse, publish, and download community configs. Find optimized module presets for any playstyle.
excerpt: Our config sharing system lets you discover and share module presets. Here's how to get the most out of it.
author: Opal Team
